title: Now Hiring Store Manager at PC Jeweller

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at PC Jeweller
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!
